publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-05-04 18:46:29 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Stereoscope photographs, 213 in number, of Icelandic landscapes, buildings, brifges, people, and events. Captions in Icelandic, several with date 1910 or 1911.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Stereoscope pictures from Iceland, #8516. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

altformavail.head: Alternate Form Available
altformavail.p: Photographs also digitally scanned in June 2015.

bibliography.head: Bibliographic References
bibliography.p: Location in source not given -- Þórunn Sigurðardóttir, Manuscript material, correspondence, and graphic material in the Fiske Icelandic Collection: a descriptive catalogue (Islandica 48), p. 258-263.
